title: schrankia occidentalis
intro: Schrankia occidentalis, also known as the Western Schrankia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to Western Australia, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Schrankia occidentalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its health benefits.
